headline: TSLA pre-market Apr 27: ~$374 (-0.6%) as market continues digesting $25B+ capex plan and negative FCF guidance for rest of 2026; stock -17% YTD; post-earnings pressure persists

Motley Fool post-earnings: Musk says robotaxi 'will not be super material this year' — targets 'dozen or so states'; $25B capex + negative FCF become new bear anchors; bull case rests entirely on 2027+ Optimus + Cybercab scale
Analyst: Cybercab to become Tesla's flagship model long-term — 'most of production will be Cybercab'; Roadster will be the only manually-driven car in Tesla's eventual fleet

Musk reveals 8M sq-ft Optimus factory at Giga Texas; Model S/X production ends late July/Aug; Optimus 3 kicks off at Fremont thereafter — Roadster 'only a month late so far,' hover capability confirmed

🚀 Musk posts official Cybercab production video — 'Cybercab has started production'; footage shows interior with NO steering wheel or pedals; multiple units confirmed built; TSLA +<1% premarket after post-earnings selloff
source: Elon Musk / X · Bloomberg · Benzinga · Sherwood News

headline: Tesla Spring Update 2026.14.1/2026.14.2 goes wide release — Hey Grok voice assistant, standalone FSD app, Cyberhog Pet Mode, sharper Model 3/Y visualizations now rolling fleet-wide
🚨 Tesla quietly buries $2B AI hardware acquisition in 10-Q — unnamed company; $1.8B contingent on deployment milestones; could accelerate Optimus or FSD chip roadmap
⚠️ TSLA closes $373.60, -3.59% post-earnings — CFO confirms negative FCF for rest of 2026; $25B capex ($5B above prior guidance); Fortune: 'earned next to nothing on cars in Q1'; -17% YTD

Musk on Q1 call: Optimus production starts 'late July or August' at Fremont — second Giga Texas factory targets summer 2027; Gen 3 reveal pushed closer to production; ramp rates 'impossible to predict'
⚠️ Musk confirms HW3 CANNOT achieve Unsupervised FSD — 'simply does not have the capability'; only 1/8 memory bandwidth of HW4/AI4; v14 Lite (supervised only) coming to HW3 by end of June
